ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the department belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the project belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used in the experiment (e.g., M4, M5) */,
  "low_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the input range for the experiment */,
  "high_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the input range for the experiment */,
  "reps" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions conducted for the experiment */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value used during the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment and its objectives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with these metrics */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the model in seconds */,
  "runtime_scaled" REAL /* Scaled runtime for comparison purposes */,
  "P" INTEGER /* Total number of predictions made */,
  "TP" INTEGER /* True positives count */,
  "FN" INTEGER /* False negatives count */,
  "N" INTEGER /* Total negatives count */,
  "TN" INTEGER /* True negatives count */,
  "FP" INTEGER /* False positives count */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-user relationship */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user played in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the results */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of results from the experiment, including key findings */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the experiment */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the experiment results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has access to the experiment */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method or algorithm type (e.g., M4, M5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its intended use case */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-model relationship */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
